query:
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.leadId,
  f.corretorId,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  l.nome as leadNome,
  l.corretorId as leadCorretorId,
  u.name as nomeCorretor
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON f.corretorId = u.id
WHERE l.nome LIKE '%Marcio Lira%';
